title: identity: from_secret_bytes leaves ed_seed and hpke_seed_bytes as unzeroized stack variables
description: In Identity::from_secret_bytes, ed_seed and hpke_seed_bytes are plain [u8;32] stack variables. They are not wrapped in Zeroizing, so raw key material lingers on the stack after the function returns. SigningKey zeroizes on drop, but the source ed_seed array it was constructed from does not. x25519-dalek's StaticSecret only zeroizes on drop when its 'zeroize' feature is enabled; the workspace Cargo.toml only enables 'static_secrets', not 'zeroize'. Fix: wrap ed_seed and hpke_seed_bytes in Zeroizing<[u8;32]>, and enable the 'zeroize' feature for x25519-dalek.
